notes: Direct Jira API call could not be executed from the current agent toolset.
Evidence suggests SC-1 is intended/used in workflow artifacts and Jira comment script.

summary: SauceDemo shopper journey for ticket SC-1
description: As a shopper, I want reliable login, catalog, cart, and checkout behavior so that I can complete purchases across desktop and mobile devices.
user_story: As a shopper, I want reliable login, catalog, cart, and checkout behavior so that I can complete purchases across desktop and mobile devices.
acceptance_criteria: Valid login redirects to products page; required-field errors are shown for missing credentials.
Authenticated session remains valid on protected page refresh.
Catalog shows name, image, description, and price for each product.
Unauthenticated access to products and checkout routes is blocked and redirected to login.
Cart item removal updates item list and badge count accurately.
Checkout from cart navigates to checkout information page when prerequisites are met.
Checkout information enforces mandatory first name, last name, and postal code.
Order can be completed from overview page and confirmation is shown; cart clears after purchase.
Core flows are usable on desktop viewport without layout breakage and with clear feedback.
Key screens load within 2 seconds under baseline test conditions.
